A

addCustomizedItemToCart(String, ArrayList<String>, double) - Method in class frontend.CashierDashboard
Receives a customized drink from the DrinkCustomization modal and adds it to both the backend order tracking list and the frontend GUI cart.
App - Class in frontend
The main entry point for the Boba POS System application.
App() - Constructor for class frontend.App
 

C

CashierDashboard - Class in frontend
The main point-of-sale interface for cashiers.
CashierDashboard(int, String) - Constructor for class frontend.CashierDashboard
Constructs the CashierDashboard for a specific logged-in employee.
Credentials - Class in frontend
Stores the database authentication credentials.
Credentials() - Constructor for class frontend.Credentials
 

D

Database - Class in frontend
Manages the JDBC connection to the PostgreSQL database.
Database() - Constructor for class frontend.Database
 
DrinkCustomization - Class in frontend
A modal dialog window that allows cashiers to select add-ons (like boba or jelly) for a specific drink before adding it to the cart.
DrinkCustomization(CashierDashboard, String, double) - Constructor for class frontend.DrinkCustomization
Constructs the DrinkCustomization dialog.

F

frontend - package frontend
 

G

getConnection() - Static method in class frontend.Database
Opens a new database connection using the configured credentials.

I

InventorySystem - Class in frontend
The graphical interface for managing the restaurant's physical inventory.

Constructs the InventorySystem dashboard.

L

LoginScreen - Class in frontend
The graphical user interface for the login screen.
LoginScreen() - Constructor for class frontend.LoginScreen
Constructs the LoginScreen, initializing the UI components, setting up the layout, and attaching action listeners for authentication.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class frontend.App
Main method that launches the UI on the Swing event dispatch thread.
ManagerDashboard - Class in frontend
The management interface providing administrative controls and analytics.

Constructs the ManagerDashboard for a specific logged-in manager.

password - Static variable in class frontend.Credentials
The PostgreSQL database password.

The administrative interface for managing menu items and pricing.

R

RecipeManagement - Class in frontend
A dialog window for managers to view, add, update, or remove ingredient mappings for specific menu items.

Constructs the RecipeManagement interface.

username - Static variable in class frontend.Credentials
